name: online-categories
description: Cattegories.io — real-time multiplayer word game: one letter, 60 seconds, six categories, public and private rooms

scripts.cap:copy: cp env.production.js public/env.js && npx cap copy
scripts.cap:ios: cp env.production.js public/env.js && npx cap copy ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: cp env.production.js public/env.js && npx cap copy android && npx cap open android
